name: First Conversation Setup
description: Everything you need to go from a blank terminal to a real conversation with your AI agent. No coding required.
tagline: From PowerShell to dialogue in 20 minutes.

skills.name: weather
skills.description: Get current weather and forecasts. Great first skill to test your setup is working.

skills.name: web-search
skills.description: Search the web from within your agent conversation.

env_vars.description: Your Claude API key from Anthropic

setup_steps.title: Download OpenClaw
setup_steps.description: OpenClaw is the free app that runs your AI agent locally on your machine. Download and install it — takes about 3 minutes.

setup_steps.title: Get your API key
setup_steps.description: You need a Claude API key from Anthropic. Go to console.anthropic.com, sign up for free, and create an API key. Copy it — you'll need it in the next step.

setup_steps.title: Add your API key to OpenClaw
setup_steps.description: Open OpenClaw, go to Settings, and paste your API key. This connects your agent to Claude.

setup_steps.title: Install your first skills
setup_steps.description: Skills give your agent abilities. Run this command in your terminal to install the starter skills included in this package.

setup_steps.title: Start your first conversation
setup_steps.description: Open a new chat in OpenClaw and type: "What's the weather like in London today?" — if it answers, you're set up. Welcome.

changelog.notes: Initial release. The package we wish existed when we started.
